rationale: The citing article is a commentary explicitly focused on recent attraction-effect null findings and boundary conditions, and its note says it interprets Frederick, Lee, and Baskin (2014)—which aligns directly with the cited paper “The Limits of Attraction” (10.1509/jmr.12.0061).
